claim_boundary: Frozen preflight-binding and receipt-builder CLI recovery only; not model quality, binding, Kd, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, Top7500, or production promotion.

legacy_102_test_contract.invocation: python HASH_BOUND_EXACT_FILE_RUNNER LEGACY_ROOT <exact thirteen tests/*.py relative paths> --verbosity 2

minimal_causal_change.new: V1.3.5 retains the exact V1.3.4 legacy launcher/loader bytes, binds the actual c3bae8a5... launcher SHA, and aligns --v1-3-5-test-log with args.v1_3_5_test_log; two new regressions exercise actual-file hash equality and the real CLI parse/build path.
minimal_causal_change.old: V1.3.4 froze the correct exact-file unittest adapter but its preflight bound a stale legacy-launcher SHA and the receipt builder parser exposed --v1-3-3-test-log while build() read args.v1_3_4_test_log.
minimal_causal_change.scope: preflight hash binding, receipt-builder CLI flag/destination, lifecycle version strings, regression tests, and hashes only

superseded_v1_3_4.failure: Preflight bound stale legacy launcher SHA and receipt-builder CLI destination did not match build().
